config_note: Knowledge tasks dispatch by explicit stage_key columns. Uvicorn web processes run with TASK_WORKER_AUTOSTART=0. scripts/backend_watchdog.sh dynamically starts standalone task_worker_main processes only when there are executable, non-paused pending tasks. worker_process_slots is the max worker process count unless TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES overrides it; worker_min_processes=0 lets idle workers exit after worker_idle_exit_seconds. worker_scale_pending_per_process controls scale-out pressure, so 10 pending executable tasks request about 1 worker process. Each worker still hot-reloads this JSON every 5s. worker_total_memory_limit_mb=73728 lets the worker group use up to about 72GB RSS before watchdog restarts only the worker group. claim_lock_scope=group avoids one global DB claim lock; workers claim through row locks plus short stage-group locks so different resource pools can fill in parallel. lane_concurrency is the resource-pool budget: local_preprocess is local CPU/disk/conversion work capped near local CPU capacity, vision_analysis is VLM/OCR cloud vision work, llm_analysis is LLM fusion/profile/graph work, derived_index and relation_build are downstream DB work. The worker scheduler chooses the most underfilled resource pool first, then applies stage_dispatch_order only inside that pool, so entry/local/VLM/LLM/relation lanes cannot starve each other. dynamic_stage_concurrency redistributes a lane budget across only the active stages in that lane by fair share plus backlog weight. Changing DB pool env values still requires backend restart; worker scaling config is read by the watchdog loop.

model_auto_pause.error_message: QueuePool limit of size 8 overflow 1 reached, connection timed out, timeout 120.00 (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/3o7r)
